name: ADN Bridge
description: Bind Telegram topics to Git repos (GitHub/GitLab/private). Auto-clone and launch ACP coding sessions with one click.

reposDir.description: Root directory for cloned repos. Defaults to ~/repos.

defaultRuntime.description: Default coding runtime. Defaults to claude.

defaultGitHost.description: Default Git host for short repo specs (e.g., 'org/repo'). Use 'github.com' (default) or your private GitLab host like 'gitlab.company.com'.

gitHosts.description: List of Git hosts to check SSH keys for during preflight. Defaults to ['github.com'] plus defaultGitHost if different.

reposDir.label: Repos Directory
reposDir.help: Where to clone repos. Defaults to ~/repos.

defaultGitHost.label: Default Git Host
defaultGitHost.help: Default Git host for short repo specs like 'org/repo'. Use 'github.com' or your private GitLab like 'gitlab.company.com'.

gitHosts.label: Git Hosts
gitHosts.help: List of Git hosts to check SSH keys for. Defaults to github.com + defaultGitHost.
